name: Chickadillo (Chicken Picadillo)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Chicken breast, boneless, skinless - cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Sauté the onion, green pepper, and garlic until soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the chicken and stir-fry for about 5 minutes.
4. Add tomato sauce, wine, cumin, bay leaves, raisins, capers, and olives to taste.
5. Cover pan, reduce heat and cook for 10 minutes, or until chicken is well-cooked.
6. Remove bay leaves. Serve with white rice and fried ripe plantains.
